{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Underlord step one
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The first step to [[Underlord]] is opening the [[soulspace]] by reaching [[Truegold]] peak and controlling [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“First, you must open your soulspace, which involves reaching the peak of Truegold and controlling your madra completely.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
